Episode Summary The Troubleshooters yo to their briefing, room and receive mission instructions. h? Pardon me? You say it sounds simple? You must be new around here 
Getting There ‘Te Troubleshooters have ther insiructions Repost to Briefing Room IOGC. They even have a map. What could be easier? Well, here's the problem. The map is about the size ofan average fingernail — way too tiny to ead, Obviously, the Troubleshooters rust enlarge the map So they can read it, or divine the location of Briefing Room |OGC in some other way. Here are a couple of things they could try: Get a Magnifying Glass: These are available through the black market (at 30 credits each) or they can be requisitioned at PLC Outing and Supply. To get one through PLC, the Troubleshooter simply fils out an equipment request form, hands it in to the Yellow PLC Clerk, and wait for the inevitable “I'm sorry ‘That isn’t available at your security clearance.
